aPrioriDNS.parity_plot

aPrioriDNS.parity_plot(x, y, rel_error=0.2, colormap='viridis', x_name='x', y_name='y', title=None, density=False, bins=200, cmin=1, c=None, linestyle='--', linewidth=2.5, vmin=None, vmax=None, cbar_title=None, marker='.', s=1, alpha=1, R2=True, RMSE=True, NRMSE=False, ticks=None, limits=None, save=False, show=True, max_dim=100000, remove_cbar=False, remove_x=False, remove_y=False)
